issues.description: Missing action: 'Set this Leader as active' requires Rest action on self (Leader). Current DSL only rests opponent's character.
Missing prerequisite condition: 'You may rest 2 of your {East Blue} type Characters' is a cost/condition that should be enforced before the ability resolves, not part of the DSL action sequence.
Action target incomplete: 'rest up to 1' means optional (maxCount=1, minCount=0), but current syntax lacks minCount specification for optional targeting.
